Notes.Text:
This update for libnfs fixes the following issue

- CVE-2026-53689: integer overflow during a connection to a crafted NFS server (bsc#1268135).

Changes for libnfs:

- Add libnfs-CVE-2026-53689.patch: ZDR: check the string size for
 sanity (bsc#1268135 CVE-2026-53689).

Vulnerabilities.Description: libnfs through 6.0.2 before 55c18ea does not validate a string size, leading to an integer overflow during a connection to a crafted NFS server. This occurs in libnfs_zdr_string in lib/libnfs-zdr.c.
